items.title: 苹果回应 Mac / iPad 等 14 款产品涨价：消费电子行业正面临前所未有的挑战
items.summary: IT之家 6 月 26 日消息，苹果公司回应昨日（6 月 25 日）上调 14 款产品价格，指出涨价 AI 数据中心扩张推高内存与存储芯片需求，导致 RAM 和 SSD 成本快速上涨。IT之家昨日报道，苹果公司上调 Mac、iPad、Vision Pro、HomePod 等 14 款产品，本轮调价暂未覆盖 iPhone、Apple Watch 和 AirPods 产品线。在通过科技媒体 MacRumors 发布的声明中，苹果公司表示本轮涨价主要受内存 RAM 和存储 SSD 元件影响：消费电子行业正面临前所未有的挑战，人工智能数据中心的快速扩张导致内存和存储需求激增。我们从未见过如此大幅度、如此迅速的元器件价格上涨。我们此前一直内部消化元件成本上涨压力，尽力避免冲击波及我们的客户。包括今天 iPad 和 Mac 等产品的涨价在内，现在我们不得不开始提高部分产品的价格。我们知道这对大家来说并非好消息，我们正在竭尽全力寻找解决方案。苹果首席执行官蒂姆 · 库克上周已表示，涨价“无法避免”。而苹果此次声明中提到“开始”涨价，也意味着后续仍可能有进一步调价空间。

items.title: Apple Raises Price Of Many Products, Including Vision Pro
items.summary: Apple Vision Pro now starts at $3700. Tim Cook blames the global memory crisis, calling it unlike anything he's ever seen.

items.title: Apple Raises Price of Vision Pro by $200 Amid RAM & Storage Shortage
items.summary:
Apple is hiking the price of essentially all of its devices, which includes the already very pricy Vision Pro standalone mixed reality headset. The News As reported by 9to5Mac, a host of Apple devices have just gotten significant price increases. The company previously confirmed this would be the case in response to the ongoing RAM […]
The post Apple Raises Price of Vision Pro by $200 Amid RAM & Storage Shortage appeared first on Road to VR.

items.title: Starvault Review: Outstanding MOBA Blasts Its Way Onto Steam
items.summary: With a diverse roster of playable heroes, gameplay packed with strategic depth and a thriving online community, first-person VR MOBA Starvault offers something genuinely worth playing.

items.title: Meta Launches Cheaper Smart Glasses Without Ray-Ban Branding
items.summary: Meta launched a range of cheaper smart glasses featuring the same technology as Ray-Ban Meta but without the branding, and with a compact folding case.
